About: It is about a biblical figure associated with the old testament.
Affects: It affects the audience with its expression of fright and terror.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the old testament.
It is associated with the apocalypse.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Benaki Museum in Athens Greece.
ConsistsOf: It consists of tempera and gold leaf on wood panel.
It consists of a wolflike demon.
It consists of a powerful demonic entity.
It consists of a lavish costume.
It consists of a cape that floats creating a weightless setting.
CreatedBy: It was created by Greek painter Theodore Poulakis.
HasA: It has a gilded gold background.
It has a wolflike demon.
It has a sculpturesque figure dressed in a lavish costume.
It has luxuriant patterns.
It has brilliant colors.
It has a cape that floats creating a weightless setting.
It has an advanced shadowing method.
It has dimension added to the shallow stage for the figures.
It has a wolflike demonic figure.
It has a muscular demonic figure.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the Late Cretan School.
It is characterized by the Early Heptanese School.
It is characterized by the traditional maniera greca.
It is characterized by an advanced painting style that evolved on the Ionian Islands.
It is characterized by a gilded gold background.
It is characterized by a sculpturesque figure.
It is characterized by a lavish costume.
It is characterized by luxuriant patterns.
It is characterized by brilliant colors.
It is characterized by a floating cape creating a weightless setting.
HeldIn: It was held in the Benaki Museum in Athens Greece.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Italian art.
It was influenced by Greek prototypes.
It was influenced by Italian prototypes.
IsA: It is a blend of both Italian and Greek prototypes.
It is a work of art.
It is a powerful demonic entity.
It is a muscular demonic figure.
KnownFor: It is known for its blend of Italian and Greek prototypes.
It is known for its advanced painting style.
It is known for its sculpturesque figure.
It is known for its lavish costume.
It is known for its brilliant colors.
It is known for its advanced shadowing method.
It is known for the depiction of a wolflike demon.
It is known for the suppression and subjugation of a powerful demonic entity.
It is known for the artist's expertise in cangiante.
LocatedIn: It is located on the Ionian Islands.
It is located in Athens Greece.
MemberOf: It is a member of the quarantia.
OccurredOn: It occurred on the Ionian Islands.
PartOf: It is part of the Cretan School.
It is part of the Heptanese School.
It is part of Greek Italian Byzantine art.
It is part of Cretan Renaissance art.
It is part of Baroque Roccoco Ionian art.
UsedAs: It is used as a representation of the Archangel Michael.
UsedFor: It is used for the care of humanity.
UsedIn: It is used in Greek Italian Byzantine art.
It is used in Cretan Renaissance art.
It is used in Baroque Roccoco Ionian art.
UsedTo: It is used to battle Satan.
